title: IdempotencyKeyConfig
description: Generator modes for core.openwop.http.idempotency-key. Both are deterministic: same logical request → same key. The previous non-deterministic 'uuid' mode was removed in 1.1.2 (safety-fix — defeated retry-safety).

mode.description: composite (default): SHA-256 of (ctx.runId, ctx.nodeId, payload). hash: SHA-256 of payload alone — use when the key must be stable across runs.
